deprecated.reason: V1 hub+hook+spoke shipped 2026-05-15 with no relay surface (only HUB could call hook). Stage 6 (this session) adds relayToRemoteHub + relayMintFromRemote + owner + relayCallers to the hub; required hub redeploy → hook redeploy (HUB immutable) → spoke re-migration. V1 contracts remain on-chain but are orphaned. PreMigration spoke pointed at the retired Base Sepolia hub. ParallelFujiSpokeV1 was deployed by a sibling session.

marketIdsBroadcastTx._note: Broadcast 2026-05-18 via contracts/script/DeployFujiMxnbMarkets.s.sol. M3+M4 share a fresh FxOracle (FxOracleMxnb above) configured for USDC + MXNB; M1/M2 continue to use the original FxOracle (EURC + USDC) which is owned by FxTimelock and was not retrofitted. See contracts/broadcast/DeployFujiMxnbMarkets.s.sol/43113/run-latest.json for tx hashes.
marketIdsBroadcastTx._pyth: Oracle pulls Pyth USD/MXN feed 0xe13b1c1ffb32f34e1be9545583f01ef385fde7f42ee66049d30570dc866b77ca with inverted=true (Pyth reports MXN per USD ≈ 17; protocol needs USD per MXNB ≈ 0.058).

gateway.rotationPlan: Owner: rotate to TimelockController / multisig. Authority on hook: rotate to FxHubMessageReceiver via EIP-1271 once Circle ships 1271 support (~mid-July 2026).
gateway.relayCallersNote: Empty until BUFX (perp/spot layer in sibling repo) lands. Whitelist via hub.setRelayCaller(bufxAddress, true).

notes: Avalanche Fuji is THE PRIMARY HUB for fx-Telaraña — all user deposits route here. Hosts the full hub stack (FxHubMessageReceiver + Morpho + V4 adapters + receipts + liquidator) AND a local FxSpoke for Fuji-side users (FxSpoke 0xb7fc... routes to local hub via CCTP V2 self-domain). Cross-hub liquidity to Arc happens at the protocol level through FxGatewayHook 0x7dA1... — never user-initiated. Arc hub at 0x44B50E93...F63C is a trading-execution destination. All 7 other spokes (eth/op/arb/poly/world/uni/arc) also point at this hub. Stage 6 plumbing (relayToRemoteHub + relayMintFromRemote) verified end-to-end on 2026-05-15.

fuji.purpose: Borrow / lend / supply liquidity on the Fuji-side Morpho markets. Money-market substrate.

arc.purpose: High-frequency FX trading + perp execution on Arc. Also runs Morpho markets (borrow/lend works here too).
